primary_text:
Supermarket beef: 14 to 21 days in cold storage. 2,400km average journey from farm to shelf.

FarmThru beef: collected from the hub the same week it left the farm. 50+ regenerative farms across NSW.

No hormones. No feedlots. 100% grass-fed.

We'll show you where your food comes from. The farm name. The farmer's name. The paddock it was raised on.

Order when you want. No commitment, no lock-in. Just honest food at honest prices.
headline: 14 days in cold storage vs same week
description: Regenerative beef from NSW farms. Collected fresh from your nearest hub.
creative_brief: Split screen. Left: industrial cold storage facility, blue tint. Right: sunlit paddock with cattle grazing. Clean sans-serif stat overlay.
